title: onosma thracica
intro: Onosma thracica is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the yellow Gentian or Onosma. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential antitumor activities. Onosma thracica can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions or as a dietary supplement.
